technologyClass: Large-Scale Battery Energy Storage System EPC

constraints.name: Land Footprint and Siting
constraints.description: Container footprint plus safety clearances and Feuerwehr access driven by site layout; mitigable via stacked decks, off-site lease, or project resizing.

constraints.name: Minimum EPC Project Scale
constraints.description: Below ~1 MWh the EPC overhead (cert, civil, PM) exceeds equipment cost; project-delivery model breaks even only at grid-scale.

constraints.name: Round-Trip Energy Loss Floor
constraints.description: Thermodynamic floor from PCS switching, cell internal resistance, and HVAC parasitic. Cannot drop below ~10% AC-AC with current LFP+PCS stack.

constraints.name: Grid-Scale Power Density Limit
constraints.description: LFP pack-level energy density ~160 Wh/L; 1 MWh per 20ft container is the practical limit for containerized stationary storage.

constraints.name: Li-Ion Thermal Runaway Onset
constraints.description: Exothermic cathode+electrolyte decomposition once onset reached. Cannot be eliminated, only contained via NOVEC/aerosol, compartmentalization, and deflagration venting (VdS 3103).

constraints.name: Organic Electrolyte Flammability
constraints.description: Carbonate electrolytes (EMC/DMC/EC) are combustible with flash points near ambient; mandates fire-rated envelope and suppression. Chemistry-inherent.

constraints.name: MV Grid Connection Capacity (DSO)
constraints.description: DSO must grant MV feeder capacity under VDE-AR-N 4110; saturated grids force upgrade or downsizing; in rare cases DSO refuses connection outright.

constraints.name: Grid-Code Certification Lead Time
constraints.description: FGW TR8 Type B plant certificate and DSO acceptance lengthen schedule; parallelizable with procurement but always on the critical path.

constraints.name: Minimum Duty Cycle for Business Case
constraints.description: Below ~200 full-cycles/yr revenue does not cover O&M + degradation amortization. Mitigable by stacking revenue streams.

constraints.name: SCADA/EMS Communication Link
constraints.description: DSO and aggregator dispatch require standards-compliant IEC 61850 or IEC 60870-5-104 uplink; cellular or fiber dependency at remote sites.

constraints.name: CAPEX Viability Ceiling
constraints.description: Above €400/kWh installed the peak-shaving/arbitrage case closes at >7-yr payback. Mitigable via revenue stacking or KfW/innovation subsidies.

constraints.name: Battery Supply Chain Concentration
constraints.description: LFP cells concentrated in CN suppliers; FX, tariff, CRMA and EU Battery Reg compliance risk. Mitigable via multi-vendor qualification.

constraints.name: Minimum Revenue-Stream Access
constraints.description: Need at least one monetization path (peak shaving, §19 StromNEV, EPEX arbitrage, FCR/aFRR prequal). No revenue = stranded asset.

constraints.name: VDE-AR-N 4110 MV Grid Code Compliance
constraints.description: Mandatory for connections ≥1 kV or >100 kW in Germany. Certification path is standard Mein Solar scope.
affectedMarketsHint: Non-DE markets (AT TOR-E, CH NA/EEA, FR Enedis)

constraints.name: FGW TR8 Plant Certification
constraints.description: Type B simplified plant certificate mandatory for MV-connected storage plants; accredited certifier (TÜV, DEKRA) required.

constraints.name: Fire-Protection Clearance (VdS 3103 / Feuerwehr)
constraints.description: Minimum distance to buildings/property line, hydrant access, separation walls for >3 MWh clusters per VdS 3103 and local Feuerwehr guidance.

constraints.name: Baugenehmigung (Municipal Building Permit)
constraints.description: Container = building under most Landesbauordnung. 3–9 month permit cycle; municipal discretion is the schedule risk.

constraints.name: EU Battery Regulation + CRMA Compliance
constraints.description: Digital battery passport, carbon footprint declaration, supply-chain due diligence, and recycling chain mandatory from 2027. Compliance effort, not a legal barrier.

constraints.name: Ambient Temperature Envelope
constraints.description: HVAC maintains internal setpoint; extremes reduce RTE and cycle life. Mitigable via upgraded cooling or heated enclosure packages.

constraints.name: Altitude Derating
constraints.description: PCS and MV transformer require derating above 1000 m ASL (standard OEM option) — reduces effective MW rating.

constraints.name: Seismic / Flood Site Risk
constraints.description: Foundation design (DIN 4149 zones) and elevated plinth (HQ100 floodplain) mitigate; restricts siting, doesn't prevent it.

knockoutPronePatterns.rationale: Below EPC economic floor; no business case irrespective of revenue stacking.

knockoutPronePatterns.pattern: ATEX Zone 0/1 co-located, no separation distance available
knockoutPronePatterns.rationale: Lithium electrolyte chemistry is inherently non-ATEX; if site topology forbids separation distance, no engineering path exists.
FGW TR8 Type B cert floor is ~6 months and cannot be compressed; cert is mandatory prerequisite to grid connection.

knockoutPronePatterns.pattern: Zero revenue-stream access (no arbitrage, no ancillary, no peak-shaving tariff)
knockoutPronePatterns.rationale: Without monetization the business case fails; mitigable only if regulatory reform is on a known timeline.
Containerized industrial asset incompatible with heritage-protection regime.

knockoutPronePatterns.pattern: DSO formally refuses connection AND no alternative POI
knockoutPronePatterns.rationale: Without a grid connection point the asset cannot operate; grid upgrade must be either possible or cost-tolerable.
Different grid-code regime (AT, CH, FR, etc.) requires engineering effort but is not impossible; certification path exists everywhere.
Extended-temp HVAC or heated enclosure packages are standard OEM options; MENA and Nordic BESS deployments prove feasibility.
Cost is never a knockout; mitigable via subsidies, revenue stacking, or project resizing.

constraints_modified: P1 footprint per dispenser instead of per MWh
P1 footprint ~10-15 MW/ha dominated by modules
